steps.title: Identify the defining phrase
steps.content: The phrase known collectively as the silversword alliance gives a name for the group of related plants.

steps.title: Apply the phrase to the choices
steps.content: Choice A states that the phrase supplies the name used to refer to a group of related plant species, which matches exactly. The other three either list species, claim uniqueness, or give a common name—none of which the phrase does. That matches choice A — A is correct.
